    Start Building
    top of page

    Give students the tools to build anything

    Help the next generation create and innovate by joining our global network of university partners.

    Partner with us

    EMPOWER STUDENT INNOVATION

    Bring next gen AI to your curriculum

    Students today don’t just want to learn about technology, they want to shape it. With Base44, anyone can build real products from day one, no coding required. We’re partnering with universities around the world to put creative power right in students’ hands, so they can learn by building, exploring, and seeing results.

    Bring Base44 
    to the classroom

    Get in touch to make hands-on GenAI creation a core part of your curriculum.

    Partner with us

    Upcoming events

    Free, hands-on opportunities for students to build, learn, and connect with creators from across the globe- from hackathons to live webinars.

     

    Join our email list to learn about future events and more.

    April 8

    Build What You Imagine: AI-Powered App Building with Base44

    In this hands-on session, you’ll learn the foundational mindset and skills behind vibe coding — guiding AI to build working software using the clarity of your ideas. You’ll write your first app-building prompt using the BASE Prompt Framework, execute it in the platform, and leave with a functioning prototype.

    Register

    So, what are we building?

    Start Building

    Base44 is the AI-powered platform that lets users build fully functioning apps in minutes. Using nothing but natural language, Base44 enables anyone to turn their words into productivity apps, back-office tools, customer portals, or complete enterprise products that are ready to use—no integrations required.
